    intro x
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun x => exp (x ^ 2)) (2 * x) x := by

      have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun x => exp (x ^ 2)) (2 * x) x := h1 x

      all_goals

        intro x hx
        have h5 : HasDerivAt (fun x => exp (x ^ 2)) (2 * x) x := h1 x
        simpa using h5.hasDerivAt

      all_goals

        have h5 : HasDerivAt (fun x => exp (x ^ 2)) (2 * x) x := h1 x

    exact h4
